title: helichrysum galpinii
intro: Helichrysum galpinii, also known as the Golden Everlasting, is a flowering plant species native to South Africa. It is prized for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant has been traditionally used to treat a range of health issues, including arthritis, wounds, and respiratory problems, and has also been shown to have anti-cancer and anti-anxiety effects. Helichrysum galpinii can be prepared as an essential oil, capsule, or topical cream, making it a versatile herbal remedy for various health benefits.
